headline: Invesco’s Tokenized Funds Push With Superstate Meets Undervalued Share Story
summary: Invesco (NYSE:IVZ) has partnered with Superstate to advance tokenized funds and digital asset infrastructure. The alliance positions Invesco as an early adopter of blockchain based fund technology for investment vehicles. The collaboration includes work on future products that could influence how fund management uses tokenization. Invesco enters this partnership with Superstate while its shares trade at $24.81. The stock is up 5.2% over the past week and 6.9% over the past month. Over the...
